proposed_from.topic: Multiplicative Goodman-Bacon for staggered Poisson difference-in-differences: characterize the probability limit of the naive two-way (unit+time) fixed-effects PPML single-coefficient estimand under staggered adoption with heterogeneous multiplicative (proportional) treatment effects, and derive the sharp forbidden-comparison sign condition sign(d beta*/d delta_gt) = sign(Wtilde_gt), where Wtilde is the pseudo-true-weight (weighted-FWL) residual of the treatment indicator partialled against the unit and time fixed effects — showing a cohort with a larger true positive proportional effect can strictly lower the reported coefficient via already-treated cohorts acting as effective controls (the Poisson/multiplicative analog of Goodman-Bacon 2021 and de Chaisemartin-D'Haultfoeuille 2020, whose linear weighted-sum decomposition is Jensen-obstructed in the multiplicative case per Moreau-Kastler 2025). Deliver: (K1) an implicit PPML projection theorem — beta* is the unique pseudo-true root of the misspecified FE-Poisson score (White 1982), closed-form in a 2-cohort/3-period minimal instance, not a convex combination of the delta_gt; (K2) the effect-dependent sign condition with derivative E[Wtilde_it * d mu_it/d delta_gt] / E[w*_it Wtilde_it^2], the characterization of forbidden (negative-Wtilde) cells, and a proven-non-vacuous 2x3 instance; (K3) the corrected counterfactual-share-weighted proportional ATT PTT = sum omega_gt delta_gt (positive weights) with the influence function and consistent analytical asymptotic variance of the imputation ratio-of-ratios estimator, open in Moreau-Kastler 2025. Substrate: Wooldridge 2023 multiplicative parallel trends E[Y_it(0)|i,t]=exp(alpha_i+gamma_t).
proposed_from.novelty_justification: {"repo_axis":"The archived adjacent proposals concern linear residualized functionals or withdraw staggered nonlinear claims. None derives the actual unit-FE pseudo-true coefficient's collapse to heterogeneous baseline cohort masses, an effect-dependent mean-weighted-FWL iff sign rule, or a T=4 all-positive-effect reversal witness.","published_axis":"Moreau-Kastler's 2x3 individual-FE illustration and White's pseudo-true score are support, not novelty. Nagengast and Yotov estimate and aggregate granular extended-TWFE PPML effects, whereas the present kernel characterizes the misspecified single-coefficient unit-FE PPML projection they avoid. de Chaisemartin and D'Haultfoeuille's verified result is a linear weighted-sum theorem, which is treated only as informed-by because it is not a comparator frontier for PPML. The claimed advance is the unit-FE collapse, derivative rule, and unresolved primitive zero-level characterization."}
seed_list: A general KL-projection and weighted-FWL map for the pooled staggered PPML coefficient, anchored in MoreauKastler2025PTT's unresolved nonlinear aggregation problem.
An if-and-only-if local forbidden-comparison rule for PPML, anchored in MoreauKastler2025PTT and deChaisemartinDHaultfoeuille2020TWFE.
Analytical influence-function inference for the PPML imputation ratio, anchored in MoreauKastler2025PTT's bootstrap-only recommendation.
An exact frontier for when the pooled PPML coefficient equals PTT, anchored in Wooldridge2023NonlinearDiD's flexible alternative.
A computable diagnostic that estimates effect-response residual signs before reporting pooled PPML, anchored in the wrong-comparison warning of MoreauKastler2025PTT.
A minimax rate for counterfactual-share PTT under many fixed effects, anchored in BorusyakJaravelSpiess2024EventStudy's linear imputation theory.
A nonlinear event-study contamination map for PPML lead and lag coefficients, anchored in GoodmanBacon2021DiD and MoreauKastler2025PTT.
A sensitivity frontier for PTT under bounded violations of multiplicative parallel trends, anchored in Wooldridge2023NonlinearDiD.

seed_details.one_line: A general KL-projection and weighted-FWL map for the pooled staggered PPML coefficient, anchored in MoreauKastler2025PTT's unresolved nonlinear aggregation problem.

anchor_paper.author: Moreau-Kastler
anchor_paper.claim: TWFE PPML has wrong comparisons under staggered heterogeneous proportional effects, but lower-level effects do not aggregate naturally.
anchor_paper.location: Introduction pp. 2-3; Section 3.1 pp. 14-16; Appendix B1 pp. 49-50
anchor_paper.verbatim_quote: aggregation of lower-level effects is challenging in the non-linear case

seed_details.anti_pattern_check: PASS: it names the pseudo-true projection map and its nonlinear residual geometry, not a relabelled OLS decomposition.
seed_details.referee_objection: Immediate from White (1982), because PPML is just a misspecified QMLE.
seed_details.rebuttal: White gives generic QMLE convergence, not the staggered FE profile, closed 2x3 formula, or causal comparison with PTT.
seed_details.strict_delta: A theorem-level nonlinear projection map and exact 2x3 formula absent from the anchor.

adversarial_referee.instance: Moreau-Kastler already solves the two-by-three case.
adversarial_referee.rebuttal_or_downgrade: Only the sample likelihood formula appears; the population score geometry and derivative theorem are absent.

adversarial_referee.instance: A pseudo-true root is not an interpretable causal object.
adversarial_referee.rebuttal_or_downgrade: That is the point of the diagnostic: it distinguishes the reported projection from PTT.

adversarial_referee.instance: Two units cannot support a general result.
adversarial_referee.rebuttal_or_downgrade: The finite-N theorem is general; the two-by-three design is a required transparent reduction.

seed_details.one_line: An if-and-only-if local forbidden-comparison rule for PPML, anchored in MoreauKastler2025PTT and deChaisemartinDHaultfoeuille2020TWFE.

anchor_paper.author: de Chaisemartin and D'Haultfoeuille
anchor_paper.claim: Linear TWFE can have negative treatment-cell weights and a negative coefficient despite positive effects.

seed_details.anti_pattern_check: PASS: the sign object is derived from nonlinear weighted-FWL geometry and holds over a strict region, not a single numerical witness.
seed_details.referee_objection: It is merely the linear negative-weight theorem with exponential notation.
seed_details.rebuttal: The PPML residual and hence sign are effect-dependent through the pseudo-true mean; fixed linear weights are unavailable.
seed_details.strict_delta: The derivative identity and open positive-effect sign-reversal region are not in either comparator.

adversarial_referee.instance: Only sufficiency of a negative residual may be shown.
adversarial_referee.rebuttal_or_downgrade: The positive Hessian denominator and response-weight definition target both directions.

adversarial_referee.instance: The sign reversal is tuned to one baseline.
adversarial_referee.rebuttal_or_downgrade: Strict inequalities define a nondegenerate region around q_3=1.

adversarial_referee.instance: dCDH already covers any link function.
adversarial_referee.rebuttal_or_downgrade: Its published claim is a linear weighted sum; it does not characterize a Poisson pseudo-true score derivative.

seed_details.one_line: Analytical influence-function inference for the PPML imputation ratio, anchored in MoreauKastler2025PTT's bootstrap-only recommendation.

anchor_paper.author: Moreau-Kastler
anchor_paper.claim: The imputation ratio should converge as N grows and a unit-resampled panel bootstrap can recover standard errors.
anchor_paper.verbatim_quote: A panel bootstrap, with resampled units, can be used

seed_details.anti_pattern_check: PASS: the open object is the actual cluster influence function of a nonlinear PPML ratio, not a generic request for standard errors.
seed_details.referee_objection: The delta method makes this routine once consistency is asserted.
seed_details.rebuttal: The profiled fixed-effect score is shared across all treated cells; its linearization is the unresolved object.
seed_details.strict_delta: An explicit analytic IF and sandwich variance for this exact PPML ratio are absent.

adversarial_referee.instance: Fixed-T unit effects make imputation infeasible.
adversarial_referee.rebuttal_or_downgrade: The question explicitly asks for the asymptotic regime and profiling conditions under which the ALR is valid.

adversarial_referee.instance: Moreau-Kastler already claims consistency.
adversarial_referee.rebuttal_or_downgrade: A heuristic convergence statement plus bootstrap is not an IF or analytical variance theorem.

adversarial_referee.instance: The covariance from shared nuisance fit is unnamed.
adversarial_referee.rebuttal_or_downgrade: The handle requires a profiled score linearization at the unit-cluster level.

seed_details.one_line: An exact frontier for when the pooled PPML coefficient equals PTT, anchored in Wooldridge2023NonlinearDiD's flexible alternative.

anchor_paper.author: Wooldridge
anchor_paper.claim: Flexible canonical-link QMLE identifies nonlinear cohort-time effects under staggered intervention.
anchor_paper.verbatim_quote: the imputation and pooled estimators are identical

seed_details.anti_pattern_check: Risk: equality likely reduces to homogeneity or accidental balance and may lack an informative frontier.
seed_details.referee_objection: The equality condition is simply homogeneous effects.
seed_details.rebuttal: There may be nonlinear balance cases, but the sharpness gain is uncertain.

adversarial_referee.instance: No derived nontrivial frontier is exhibited.
Only homogeneity is sufficient.
adversarial_referee.rebuttal_or_downgrade: Would require a necessity construction before revival.

adversarial_referee.instance: It is an equality case, not estimator equivalence.

seed_details.one_line: A computable diagnostic that estimates effect-response residual signs before reporting pooled PPML, anchored in the wrong-comparison warning of MoreauKastler2025PTT.

anchor_paper.author: Moreau-Kastler
anchor_paper.claim: TWFE PPML downscales some effects under staggered adoption.
anchor_paper.verbatim_quote: the same issue plagues the TWFE PPML estimator

seed_details.anti_pattern_check: Risk: a plug-in diagnostic is an application of the derivative theorem rather than an independent kernel.
seed_details.referee_objection: This is software after the FWL theorem.
seed_details.rebuttal: The objection lands as a standalone angle; retain only as a consumer.

adversarial_referee.instance: No new characterization beyond M1.
No inference for the diagnostic.
The warning is already published.

seed_details.one_line: A minimax rate for counterfactual-share PTT under many fixed effects, anchored in BorusyakJaravelSpiess2024EventStudy's linear imputation theory.

anchor_paper.author: Borusyak, Jaravel, and Spiess
anchor_paper.claim: Linear imputation event-study estimators have robust and efficient inference under unrestricted heterogeneity.

seed_details.anti_pattern_check: Risk: a rate frontier needs a precise many-FE asymptotic regime not supplied by the gap.
seed_details.referee_objection: The minimax class is invented to force a rate.
seed_details.rebuttal: The objection currently lands; no standard lower-bound geometry was found.

adversarial_referee.instance: No nonparametric class or loss is pinned.
No lower bound is credible from the substrate.
BJS is linear, not a direct rate comparator.

seed_details.one_line: A nonlinear event-study contamination map for PPML lead and lag coefficients, anchored in GoodmanBacon2021DiD and MoreauKastler2025PTT.

anchor_paper.author: Goodman-Bacon
anchor_paper.claim: Linear staggered TWFE equals a weighted average of 2x2 comparisons.

seed_details.anti_pattern_check: Risk: it is a routine vector-valued repetition of the single-coefficient derivative.
seed_details.referee_objection: Event-study coefficients follow by replacing D with each lead or lag dummy.
seed_details.rebuttal: The objection is substantial absent a new joint geometry.

adversarial_referee.instance: No new focal object beyond more coefficients.
Joint residual signs are not characterized.
Sun-Abraham already diagnoses event-study contamination.

seed_details.one_line: A sensitivity frontier for PTT under bounded violations of multiplicative parallel trends, anchored in Wooldridge2023NonlinearDiD.

anchor_paper.author: Wooldridge
anchor_paper.claim: An exponential conditional mean implies a ratio-of-means parallel-trends assumption.
anchor_paper.verbatim_quote: PT holds in the ratio of the means

seed_details.anti_pattern_check: Risk: no natural, empirically interpretable multiplicative violation metric was located.
seed_details.referee_objection: A delta sensitivity parameter would be arbitrary.
seed_details.rebuttal: The objection currently lands; a critical-delta object cannot be defended without a primitive violation model.

adversarial_referee.instance: No sharp bounds are supplied.
No critical delta is derivable.
The anchor does not pose this sensitivity problem.

proposed_from.literature_map:
Moreau-Kastler (2025) is the direct anchor: its Introduction and Section 3.1 show that staggered heterogeneous proportional effects contaminate TWFE PPML, while Appendix B1 solves only a two-unit likelihood system.
Moreau-Kastler Section 3.2 defines the treated observed-to-counterfactual ratio and recommends a unit bootstrap rather than analytical inference.
White (1982) establishes pseudo-true KL limits and sandwich expansions for misspecified QMLE, the correct apparatus for a pooled PPML coefficient under heterogeneous effects.
Wooldridge (2023) develops nonlinear DiD under an exponential mean and recommends flexible cohort-time effects rather than a pooled heterogeneous coefficient.
de Chaisemartin and D'Haultfoeuille (2020) prove negative linear TWFE weights and sign reversals but their weights are fixed linear-projection objects.
Goodman-Bacon (2021) is the canonical linear 2x2 decomposition, which cannot be exponentiated because the PPML fitted mean changes with effects.
Borusyak, Jaravel, and Spiess (2024) provide the nearest imputation influence-function template but for additive linear effects.
The unsettled object is a nonlinear, effect-dependent weight map for beta_N^*, plus inference for the positive PTT correction.
The selected composite M1+M8 angle survives because it has three direct prior-art comparators and a sharp 2x3 nondegenerate reduction.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: honest_scope / hat_beta_N
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: No fixed-T consistency, limit distribution, or inference result is claimed for the extended-MLE sample convention.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: The accepted contribution is conditional on the stated population projection: unit-FE collapse, the derivative sign identity, and the W4 reversal witness.

banked_reason: Clean F5 with dual F4 statement convergence, zero proof holes or gates, and a field-tier novelty pass; user approved banking at CKPT 2; F7 shared-library promotion verified.
